title: WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, optometry, specialized medical care, WIC, nutrition information, maternal and child healthcare, and a diabetes program. Also offers a mobile medical bus on the Warm Springs Reservation only. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: -Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Firday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm -Mobile medical bus schedule varies, call for location and dates (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-1196 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment or walk in FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Must provide proof of tribal enrollment: Tribal ID card or Certificate of Indian Blood AREA SERVED: Crook, Deschutes, and Jefferson Counties Services: Eye Screening * Native American Community General Medical Care * Native American Community Indian Health Service Clinics Nutrition Education * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER
